description_long: This spice rack is a rectangular shelving unit with three horizontal shelves, each holding an assortment of spice containers. The containers vary in size, shape, and color, including blue, green, orange, red, and white jars and bottles, some with visible labels and lids. The rack itself is constructed from a solid, gray material, likely wood or laminate, with a simple, boxy design and no visible doors or covers. The back and sides of the rack are plain and unadorned, emphasizing its utilitarian function. The containers are neatly arranged in rows, maximizing the use of shelf space and making each spice easily accessible. This object is suitable for placement in kitchens, pantries, or other food preparation areas in urban environments.
description: A gray rectangular spice rack with three shelves, each holding a variety of colorful spice containers arranged in neat rows. The rack is simple and functional, with clearly visible labels on many of the jars.
description_view_0: Front view showing three shelves filled with various spice containers in different colors and sizes, with visible labels.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid, plain gray side panel of the rack, with no visible containers or details.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the flat, featureless back of the rack, emphasizing its boxy construction.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain gray side panel without any visible containers.
